info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud Image Segmentation proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud Image Segmentation API

post.description: This document describes the syntax and examples of the ChangeSky sky replacement feature. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=ChangeSky and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description: The URL of the target image whose sky needs to be replaced. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description: The URL of the target image whose sky needs to be replaced. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

parameters.description: The URL of the reference image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).
parameters.name: ReplaceImageURL

schema.description: The URL of the reference image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

ImageURL.description:
The URL of the image after replacement.  
The image returned after background removal is a four-channel PNG image without compression. The image dimensions remain unchanged, but the file size increases.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL becomes inaccessible. If you need to store the file for a longer duration or permanently, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

post.description: This document describes the syntax and examples of the ParseFace facial feature segmentation API. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=ParseFace and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

ImageURL.description:
The image matting result.  
A four-channel PNG image is returned after matting, without compression, maintaining the original image dimensions. The file size will increase.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. If you need to store the file for a longer duration or permanently, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

Name.description: The key value of the matting result. For details, see the table below.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of fine-grained Mask segmentation (RefineMask). The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RefineMask and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: Image URL. We recommend using an OSS Link in the China (Shanghai) Region. For local files or OSS Links outside the China (Shanghai) Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

MaskImageURL.description: The coarse mask image corresponding to the input image.

ImageURL.description:
The URL of the output fine-grained mask image.  
> This URL is temporary and has a Validity Period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. To retain the file permanently or for an extended duration, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage Space.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the human segmentation (SegmentBody) feature. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=SegmentBody and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description:
Image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For local files or OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).  
Image format requirements:  

- Supported formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG (8-bit, 16-bit, and 64-bit PNG are not supported), BMP, WEBP.  
- File size: No more than 3 MB.  
- Image resolution: Less than 2000 × 2000 pixels.  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description:
Image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For local files or OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).  
Image format requirements:  

- Supported formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG (8-bit, 16-bit, and 64-bit PNG are not supported), BMP, WEBP.  
- File size: No more than 3 MB.  
- Image resolution: Less than 2000 × 2000 pixels.  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.

parameters.description:
Specifies the format of the returned image.  

- If set to `mask`, a single-channel black-and-white image is returned.  

- If set to `crop`, a four-channel PNG image cropped to remove blank edges is returned.  

- If set to `whiteBK`, an image with a white background is returned.  

- If not set or set to any other value, a four-channel PNG image is returned.
parameters.name: ReturnForm

schema.description:
Specifies the format of the returned image.  

- If set to `mask`, a single-channel black-and-white image is returned.  

- If set to `crop`, a four-channel PNG image cropped to remove blank edges is returned.  

- If set to `whiteBK`, an image with a white background is returned.  

- If not set or set to any other value, a four-channel PNG image is returned.

Data.description: Content of the returned result data.

ImageURL.description:
URL of the resulting image.  
The request parameter specifies the format of the returned image:  
- If set to `mask`, a single-channel black-and-white image is returned.  
- If set to `crop`, a four-channel PNG image cropped to remove blank edges is returned.  
- If set to `whiteBK`, an image with a white background is returned.  
- If not set or set to any other value, a four-channel PNG image is returned without compression, maintaining the original image dimensions, which may result in a larger file size.  

> This URL is temporary and valid for 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. To retain the file permanently or for an extended period, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or another storage space.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of SegmentCloth, a clothing segmentation feature. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=SegmentCloth and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS Link in the China (Shanghai) Region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS Link in the China (Shanghai) Region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

parameters.description:
The type of segmentation result to return, which affects the content returned in the ImageURL field. This parameter is optional for the User.  

- 0 (Default Value): Default entity clothing segmentation result.  

- 1: Combined segmentation result for the class categories specified by the User.
parameters.name: OutMode

schema.description:
The type of segmentation result to return, which affects the content returned in the ImageURL field. This parameter is optional for the User.  

- 0 (Default Value): Default entity clothing segmentation result.  

- 1: Combined segmentation result for the class categories specified by the User.

parameters.description:
Clothing category. Valid values:  
- tops: Tops  
- coat: Coats  
- skirt: Skirts  
- pants: Pants  
- bag: Bags  
- shoes: Shoes  
- hat: Hats
parameters.name: ClothClass

schema.description:
Clothing category. Valid values:  
- tops: Tops  
- coat: Coats  
- skirt: Skirts  
- pants: Pants  
- bag: Bags  
- shoes: Shoes  
- hat: Hats

items.description:
Clothing category. You can pass multiple values at once. Valid values:  
- tops: Tops  
- coat: Coats  
- skirt: Skirts  
- pants: Pants  
- bag: Bags  
- shoes: Shoes  
- hat: Hats

parameters.description:
Specifies the format of the returned image. Valid values:  

- whiteBK: Returns an image with a white background.  
- mask: Returns a single-channel mask.  
- If this parameter is not set, a four-channel PNG image is returned.  
> - This parameter only affects the ImageURL in the output. It does not affect ClassUrl, which always returns a mask image.
parameters.name: ReturnForm

schema.description:
Specifies the format of the returned image. Valid values:  

- whiteBK: Returns an image with a white background.  
- mask: Returns a single-channel mask.  
- If this parameter is not set, a four-channel PNG image is returned.  
> - This parameter only affects the ImageURL in the output. It does not affect ClassUrl, which always returns a mask image.

Data.description: The Content of the returned Result Data.

ClassUrl.description:
Returns a URL corresponding to the clothing category based on the User's input `clothClass`.  
> This URL is temporary and has a Validity Period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. If you need to store the file for a long duration or permanently, access the URL within 30 minutes, download the file, and save it to your own OSS bucket or other Storage Space.

ImageURL.description:
Returns the URL of the image after background removal.  
The resulting image is a four-channel PNG without compression, maintaining the original dimensions. The file size will increase.  
> This URL is temporary and has a Validity Period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. If you need to store the file for a long duration or permanently, access the URL within 30 minutes, download the file, and save it to your own OSS bucket or other Storage Space.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of Product Segmentation (SegmentCommodity). The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=SegmentCommodity and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description:
Image URL. We recommend using an OSS link from the China (Shanghai) region. For local files or OSS links from regions other than Shanghai, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Image format requirements:

- Supported formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG (8-bit, 16-bit, and 64-bit PNG are not supported), BMP.
- File size: No larger than 3 MB.
- Image resolution: Less than 2000 × 2000 pixels.
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description:
Image URL. We recommend using an OSS link from the China (Shanghai) region. For local files or OSS links from regions other than Shanghai, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Image format requirements:

- Supported formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG (8-bit, 16-bit, and 64-bit PNG are not supported), BMP.
- File size: No larger than 3 MB.
- Image resolution: Less than 2000 × 2000 pixels.
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.

parameters.description:
Specifies the format of the returned image.

- If not set, a four-channel PNG image is returned.
- If set to `mask`, a single-channel mask is returned.
- If set to `whiteBK`, an image with a white background is returned.
- If set to `crop`, a four-channel PNG image cropped to remove blank edges is returned.
parameters.name: ReturnForm

schema.description:
Specifies the format of the returned image.

- If not set, a four-channel PNG image is returned.
- If set to `mask`, a single-channel mask is returned.
- If set to `whiteBK`, an image with a white background is returned.
- If set to `crop`, a four-channel PNG image cropped to remove blank edges is returned.

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

ImageURL.description:
The URL of the resulting image.  
The request parameter specifies the format of the returned image.

- If set to `crop`, a four-channel PNG image cropped to remove blank edges is returned.
- If set to `mask`, a single-channel mask is returned.
- If set to `whiteBK`, an image with a white background is returned.
- If not set, an uncompressed four-channel PNG image is returned, maintaining the original image dimensions, which may result in a larger file size.

> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. To retain the file permanently or for an extended duration, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the general-purpose segmentation operation SegmentCommonImage. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=SegmentCommonImage and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description:
The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link from the China (Shanghai) region. For images stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).  

Image format requirements:  
- Supported formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG (8-bit, 16-bit, and 64-bit PNG are not supported), BMP, WEBP.  
- File size: No larger than 3 MB.  
- Image resolution: Greater than 32×32 pixels and less than 2000×2000 pixels, with the longest edge no greater than 1999 pixels.  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description:
The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link from the China (Shanghai) region. For images stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).  

Image format requirements:  
- Supported formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG (8-bit, 16-bit, and 64-bit PNG are not supported), BMP, WEBP.  
- File size: No larger than 3 MB.  
- Image resolution: Greater than 32×32 pixels and less than 2000×2000 pixels, with the longest edge no greater than 1999 pixels.  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.

parameters.description:
Specifies the format of the returned image:  
- If not set, a four-channel PNG image is returned.  
- If set to `mask`, a single-channel mask is returned.  
- If set to `whiteBK`, an image with a white background is returned.  
- If set to `crop`, a four-channel PNG image cropped to remove empty margins is returned.
parameters.name: ReturnForm

schema.description:
Specifies the format of the returned image:  
- If not set, a four-channel PNG image is returned.  
- If set to `mask`, a single-channel mask is returned.  
- If set to `whiteBK`, an image with a white background is returned.  
- If set to `crop`, a four-channel PNG image cropped to remove empty margins is returned.

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

ImageURL.description:
The URL of the resulting image.  
The request parameter specifies the format of the returned image:  
- If not set, a four-channel PNG image without compression is returned, maintaining the original image dimensions; however, the file size will increase.  
- If set to `mask`, a single-channel mask is returned.  
- If set to `whiteBK`, an image with a white background is returned.  
- If set to `crop`, a four-channel PNG image cropped to remove empty margins is returned.  
> This URL is temporary and valid for 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL becomes inaccessible. To retain the file permanently or for an extended period, you must access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or another storage space.

parameters.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For local files or OSS links outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

schema.description:

- If not set, a four-channel PNG image is returned.  
- If set to `mask`, a single-channel mask is returned.  
- If set to `whiteBK`, an image with a white background is returned.

ImageURL.description:
Returns the URL of the image resulting from image matting.  
The returned image is a four-channel PNG without compression, maintaining the original dimensions, but with an increased file size.  
> This URL is temporary and valid for 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. To retain the file permanently or for an extended period, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

post.description: This document describes the syntax and examples of the hair segmentation (SegmentHair) feature. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=SegmentHair and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

Elements.description: The matting results of each sub-element.

Height.description: The height of the result image.

ImageURL.description:
The URL of the result image.  
The returned image is a four-channel PNG without compression. The image dimensions remain unchanged, but the file size increases.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL will no longer be accessible. If you need to store the file for a long time or permanently, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

Width.description: The width of the result image.

X.description: The x-axis coordinate of the top-left corner of the result image in the original image.

Y.description: The y-axis coordinate of the top-left corner of the result image in the original image.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of SegmentHDBody for high definition human segmentation. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=SegmentHDBody and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description:
Image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For local files or OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).  
Image format requirements:  
- Image formats: JPG, JPEG, BMP, PNG (with transparency).  
- File size: No larger than 40 MB.  
- Image resolution: Greater than 32×32 pixels and less than 6000×6000 pixels, with the longest edge no more than 6000 pixels.  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description:
Image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For local files or OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).  
Image format requirements:  
- Image formats: JPG, JPEG, BMP, PNG (with transparency).  
- File size: No larger than 40 MB.  
- Image resolution: Greater than 32×32 pixels and less than 6000×6000 pixels, with the longest edge no more than 6000 pixels.  
- The URL must not contain Chinese characters.

ImageURL.description:
URL of the result image.  
The output image is a four-channel PNG image generated by adding an alpha channel to the original three-channel image, without compression. The image dimensions remain unchanged, but the file size increases.  
> This URL is temporary and valid for 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL becomes inaccessible. To store the file permanently or for an extended period, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the general high-definition segmentation API SegmentHDCommonImage. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=SegmentHDCommonImage and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageUrl.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description:
The returned result data content.  
You can obtain this data only after the asynchronous task execution succeeds. You must invoke the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and deserialize the Result field from JSON to retrieve it.

ImageUrl.description:
The URL of the resulting image.  
After image matting, a four-channel PNG image is returned without compression. The image dimensions remain unchanged, but the file size increases.  
> This URL is temporary and valid for 30 minutes. After expiration, the URL becomes inaccessible. If you need to store the file permanently or for an extended period, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then save it to your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

Message.description: The message returned after submitting an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。
